Bro iph 17 ahn njn use chaiyunne, njn eduthath new ahn its been a month. Appo athil enikk oru doubt und ente cousin te kayyil iphone 13 ahn appo avamte iph il keyboard typing sound kooduthal aayittan thonnunnae enikk comparing to 17 appo njn google chaithappo ath newer versions anganae anu ennanu parayunne. Ath anganae aano? Ith speaker issue alla coz music alle video okke kaanumbol nalle sound und but keyboard typing sound kuravanu. Njn ottumikka options um on aaki sound increase aavam but no result. Appo athin enthelum solution undel onnu parayaamo?

Android user here and I dont believe any of those pseudo Android users claiming they switches to an iPhone and are sooo happy with their decision. I mean, I just did it. I got an iPhone. Its been 2 days and I already want to send it back. I hate iOS. I hate alle the limitations and missing features. I hate not being able to simply drag and drop files from my WinPC to my iPhone without having to use iTunes. I hate not being able to go back on websites and apps by swiping from right to left (in youtube I cant even go back by swiping from left to right when a video plays). I hate the keyboard. Like, wtf is this thing? Why is it so bad? I hate how there is only one volume slider for all sounds and how you dont have seperate sliders for ringtone, notifications, media, etc. And much much more. I just hate it. I'm going back to Android. No matter how golden Apples cage shines, at the end its still a cage. And I value my freedom.
